mapper.sql: id, user_id, feedback_type, content, images, status, reply_content, reply_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from t_feedback order by id desc
mapper.update: update t_feedback set user_id = #{et.userId}, feedback_type = #{et.feedbackType}, content = #{et.content}, images = #{et.images}, status = #{et.status}, reply_content = #{et.replyContent}, reply_time = #{et.replyTime}, create_time = #{et.createTime}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} where id = #{et.id}
